description: Move patient authentication surfaces from Next pages into the Vite patient app. Scope: sign-in, sign-up, reset-password, verify-email, and sign-out; preserve Cognito integration and secure session cookie exchange through /api/auth/session; preserve returnTo handling; keep copy and visual treatment consistent with current product UI; ensure static shell contains no patient-specific data. Acceptance criteria: auth pages work in Vite local dev; successful sign-in sets session through API Gateway/Lambda; sign-out clears session; existing AuthPanel tests or equivalents are migrated; E2E auth-protected route behavior passes against the Vite app.
title: Move patient auth pages to Vite app
